summary: The Director instructed the Assistant to provide exact, uncropped prompt text, two per answer, which the Assistant confirmed. The first two prompts were delivered, designed to capture key moments in "Aisha's journey," from a desolate approach to the "House in the Rocks," with one prompt integrating a "new starry night scene" (`401.png`) into an interior view. The specified output style is a `premium luminous 3D animated feature-film` with a `4K animated movie look`, featuring `true 3D depth`, `cinematic camera angles`, `volumetric golden hour light`, and `shallow cinematic 3d depth of field` focused on foreground characters. Character locks include Aisha (16-year-old human princess), Dora (white panther), and Djinn (plasma-form being). A `Desolate City Ruins - Overview` (`@image4`), a user-provided 4-projection grid of Nabatean-style ruins, serves as a location reference. The Assistant will continue to provide the remaining prompts in batches of two.
